name: econdo-qa-lab
description: Base Node.js para laboratorio de QA com login e autenticacao

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api
scripts.test:security: docker run --rm --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD":/zap/wrk ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-baseline.py -t ${ZAP_TARGET:-http://host.docker.internal:3000} -J /zap/wrk/qa/reports/zap-report.json -r /zap/wrk/qa/reports/zap-report.html -m 2 || true
